acceptance: Every maintained release dependency in the modern stack has version, archive, URL, and SHA-256 ownership recorded.

notes: libssh2 remains only inside the selected libcurl release closure.

acceptance: Release helpers build and locate the modern dependency set without host leakage.

notes: libcurl is built with OpenSSL, zlib, libssh2, and pruned unused protocols/features.
